title: malus striata
intro: Malus striata, also known as the striped apple, is a species of apple tree native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Malus striata are numerous, including its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
